features.name: Bardic Inspiration (1st level)
features.description: You gain the Bardic Inspiration feature. By using your action, you can grant advantage to a friendly creature on its next ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, or you can grant it a +5 temporary hit point. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration (2nd level)
features.description: You can now grant advantage on two ability checks, attack rolls, or saving throws, or give a friendly creature two +5 temporary hit points.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration (3rd level)
features.description: You can now grant advantage on three ability checks, attack rolls, or saving throws, or give a friendly creature three +5 temporary hit points.
